_comment:
MCP servers offered to the Cursor agent that works on this repo (IDE, local SDK run, or cloud). Read-only. The agent uses these to confirm the incident's metric signature itself (query_prometheus, generate_deeplink) and to look at merged PRs. Requires the mcp-grafana / github-mcp-server binaries on the agent's PATH and the env below set. On a local run these reach your localhost stack; a cloud run needs a reachable Grafana (tunnel or hosted). See docs/agent-mcp.md.

The 'causa' server lets you query live investigation state directly from the Cursor chat without opening Streamlit. Requires the Causa API to be running (task run:local). Tools: list_investigations, get_investigation, get_rca, get_latest_investigation, get_investigation_summary.
